# mtncloud_ipv4_ip_pool (Resource)

Manages a Morpheus-managed IPv4 address pool in MTN Cloud.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mtncloud_ipv4_ip_pool" "app" {
  name    = "app-pool"
  gateway = "10.20.0.1"
  netmask = "255.255.255.0"

  ip_range = [
    {
      starting_address = "10.20.0.10"
      ending_address   = "10.20.0.200"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip_range` (Attributes List) One or more contiguous IP address ranges in the pool. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ip_range))
- `name` (String) Name of the IP pool.

### Optional

- `dns_domain` (String) DNS domain for the pool.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway IP address for the pool.
- `netmask` (String) Netmask for the pool.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the IP pool.

<a id="nestedatt--ip_range"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ip_range`

Required:

- `ending_address` (String) Last address of the range.
- `starting_address` (String) First address of the range.
